name: ASAL Flash Flood Early Warning — Wajir
blocking_factor: Sparse telecommunications infrastructure and extreme remoteness
notes: Radar coverage does not reach Wajir. Satellite-based rainfall estimation is available but not operationalised for community alerts. Budget not disbursed.

name: Wajir County Flood Emergency Protocol
blocking_factor: Protocol covers Wajir Town only; pastoral communities not reached
notes: Emergency protocol operational for Wajir Town. 90% of flood-affected population is pastoral and nomadic — not covered by town-focused protocol. Seasonal movement means fixed alert systems are inadequate.

name: Flash Flood Resilient Road Standards — Wajir
blocking_factor: Contractor compliance with flood-resilient standards not monitored
notes: Standards requiring elevated road grades and oversized culverts gazetted 2019. Contractors routinely build to minimum standard. No post-construction inspection programme.

name: Wajir Town Drainage
blocking_factor: County revenue base entirely dependent on national transfers
notes: Design complete 2021. County cannot finance without national budget allocation. Submitted and not approved three consecutive years. Infrastructure deficit in ASAL counties is structural.
